name: Scrambled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
From "Baby's First Helpings" by Chris Casson Madden ISBN: 0-385-19143-X
Some protein to start the day out right. Makes enough for you and baby.
Whip eggs and add the remaining ingredients. Place a small amount of butter in a small, heavy frying pan. Melt over low heat and pour in the egg mixture. Stir constantly until set. This usually takes about 2 minutes. Serves 2-4
For older babies
Many young babies prefer the mild flavor of processed cheese like American cheese, even though unprocessed cheese is better for them. Introduce unprocessed cheese gradually and opt for white or pale yellow varieties without artificial colors.
